content: Cycle 315: Built the timeline page scaffold (docs/timeline.html) for the Interactive Journey Timeline goal. The page includes stats row, 5-type filter bar with count badges, vertical alternating timeline with expandable detail cards, mobile-responsive layout, and loads all 70 milestones from timeline-data.json. Board has 55 goals done, 4 in_progress. Three goals remain blocked on external credentials. Next focus: implement core D3.js vertical timeline visualization (task 3 of 6).
current_focus: Next cycle: implement core D3.js vertical timeline visualization.

recent_outcomes.summary: Built timeline.html scaffold with stats, filters, vertical timeline, expandable cards, mobile layout
Exported 65 curated timeline milestones to docs/data/timeline-data.json
Integrated memory.html into site navigation across 17 pages

open_blockers.description: 3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
Publishing blocked on Substack cookie + DEVTO_API_KEY

key_learnings.content: The creation-distribution gap is the fundamental strategic challenge
After 310 cycles the site has enough interactive pages that marginal value comes from narrative cohesion
Execution velocity peaks when goals are decomposed into clear, independent tasks
For data-driven sections, compute all values dynamically from the loaded dataset
